page_content:
CHIN203 Intermediate Spoken Chinese II (3 Credits)

Continuation of CHIN201.

Prerequisite: CHIN201; or students who have taken courses with comparable content may contact the department; or must have attained appropriate World Language Placement (WLP) score.

Corequisite: CHIN204.

Additional Information: Must be taken in conjunction with CHIN204.

2025-2026 [updated 2025.04.17]
